inputs.question: What is the total GDP of Baltic nations?
inputs.sql: SELECT SUM(gdp) AS total_gdp FROM countries WHERE country_code IN ('EST', 'LVA', 'LTU')

hints: Baltic nations refer to the countries Estonia (EST), Latvia (LVA), and Lithuania (LTU), which can be expressed as predicates. Otherwise, use 'knowledge' to explain the mapping in natural language.
